comment.text: Dry-run payload construction only. No Metaculus submission endpoint was called.

sample_question.description:
US President Donald Trump's net approval rating has long hovered between -10 and -20, with him holding an unprecedentedly [stable approval rating](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Opinion_polling_on_the_first_Trump_presidency) during his first term. 

During Trump's second term, his approval has moved more substantially, starting with a positive approval rating, before dropping into a negative rating, reaching the high teens as of December 2025.
sample_question.resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as Donald Trump's net approval rating on December 31, 2026, according to data from the [Silver Bulletin](https://www.natesilver.net/p/trump-approval-ratings-nate-silver-bulletin).
sample_question.title: What will be Donald Trump's net approval on December 31, 2026?
